title: Tidal Charting Hull: EEF plan consistency fix claim opened
body: Opened claim 5a50235c-e331-4647-ba57-f14b0fc1795a for the EEF plan consistency fix: eef-graph-tool-completion.plan.md, the EEF README, and the Codex sweep brief. Active-claims was empty before opening, so no other active claims were present on these surfaces.
